mapper.select: SELECT pr.PROC_RESULT_ID AS procResultId, pr.RESULT_ID AS resultId, pr.ROUTING_ID AS routingId, pr.PROCESS_SEQ AS processSeq, pr.PROCESS_CD AS processCd, pr.PROCESS_NM AS processNm, pr.START_DTM AS startDtm, pr.END_DTM AS endDtm, pr.INPUT_QTY AS inputQty, pr.OUTPUT_QTY AS outputQty, pr.GOOD_QTY AS goodQty, pr.DEFECT_QTY AS defectQty, pr.WORKER_ID AS workerId, pr.EQUIPMENT_CD AS equipmentCd, pr.WORK_TIME AS workTime, pr.PROCESS_STATUS AS processStatus, pr.LOT_NO AS lotNo, pr.PROC_RMK AS procRmk, pr.REG_USER_ID AS regUserId, pr.REG_DTM AS regDtm FROM PRD_PROCESS_RESULT pr WHERE pr.RESULT_ID = #{resultId} ORDER BY pr.PROCESS_SEQ ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRD_PROCESS_RESULT ( RESULT_ID, ROUTING_ID, PROCESS_SEQ, PROCESS_CD, PROCESS_NM, START_DTM, END_DTM, INPUT_QTY, OUTPUT_QTY, GOOD_QTY, DEFECT_QTY, WORKER_ID, EQUIPMENT_CD, WORK_TIME, PROCESS_STATUS, LOT_NO, PROC_RMK, REG_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{request.resultId}, #{request.routingId}, #{request.processSeq}, #{request.processCd}, #{request.processNm}, #{request.startDtm}, #{request.endDtm}, #{request.inputQty}, #{request.outputQty}, #{request.goodQty}, COALESCE(#{request.defectQty}, 0), #{request.workerId}, #{request.equipmentCd}, #{request.workTime}, COALESCE(#{request.processStatus}, '대기'), #{request.lotNo}, #{request.procRmk}, #{regUserId} )
